## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? 1-3 bullet points. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Content update (copy, images, assets)
- [ ] Layout / structure change
- [ ] New section or page
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / deployment config

## Pre-merge Checklist

- [ ] Previewed locally — homepage loads, logos render, forms work
- [ ] Mobile layout checked (≤480px viewport)
- [ ] Privacy policy link works
- [ ] No absolute filesystem paths in HTML
- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed
- [ ] Asset paths are relative (`assets/logos/...`)
- [ ] OG image path returns 200 on deploy preview
